# Getting Help with Jarvy

Thank you for using Jarvy! This document outlines the various ways you can get help.

## Quick Resources

| Resource | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `jarvy doctor` | Diagnose environment issues |
| `jarvy faq` | Search frequently asked questions |
| `jarvy --help` | View available commands |
| [Documentation](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy#readme) | Full documentation |

## Before Asking for Help

1. **Run diagnostics**: `jarvy doctor` identifies common issues
2. **Check the FAQ**: `jarvy faq search "<your issue>"` or browse [online FAQ](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy#faq)
3. **Search existing issues**: Your question may already be answered in [Issues](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy/issues)
4. **Check Discussions**: Browse [Q&A discussions](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy/discussions/categories/q-a)

## Getting Help

### GitHub Discussions (Recommended)

For questions, ideas, and community support:

- **[Q&A](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy/discussions/categories/q-a)** - Ask questions and get help
- **[Ideas](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy/discussions/categories/ideas)** - Suggest new features
- **[Show & Tell](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy/discussions/categories/show-and-tell)** - Share your Jarvy configs

### GitHub Issues

For bugs and feature requests:

- **[Bug Reports](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)** - Report a bug
- **[Feature Requests](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)** - Request a feature
- **[Tool Requests](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy/issues/new?template=tool_request.yml)** - Request a new tool

### Security Issues

**Do not report security vulnerabilities publicly.**

Please use [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/jarvy-dev/jarvy/security/advisories/new) to report security issues privately. See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for our security policy.

## What to Include When Asking for Help

To help us help you faster, please include:

```bash
# Run this command and include the output
jarvy doctor
```

Also helpful:
- Your `jarvy.toml` configuration (remove any secrets)
- The exact command you ran
- The full error message or unexpected behavior
- Your operating system and version

## Response Times

Jarvy is an open-source project maintained by volunteers:

- **GitHub Discussions**: Community members typically respond within a few days
- **Bug Reports**: Triaged within a week
- **Security Issues**: Acknowledged within 48 hours

## Contributing

Found the answer to your question? Consider:
- Improving our documentation
- Adding to the FAQ
- Helping others in Discussions

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) for how to contribute.

## Code of Conduct

All community interactions are governed by our [Code of Conduct](./CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md). Please be respectful and constructive.
